prompt: A hand-drawn Japanese illustration sketchnote infographic poster, vertical portrait 1024x1792. Clean white paper background with ink splatter strokes and pastel watercolor. Modular sections separated by wavy ink dividers. HEADLINE large calligraphy: "FutureOS 代码架构". Subtitle: "本地AI Agent工作空间, Rust+TypeScript". Section 1: "六大子项目" — agent(Rust引擎) tui(终端UI) cli(命令行) gui(Tauri桌面) channels(飞书钉钉). Section 2: "五层架构" — 前端→gRPC→Agent→工具层→LLM层(906+模型). Section 3: "Agent循环" — Steering→中断→压缩→LLM→解析→重试→工具→FollowUp. Section 4: "沙箱三层" — Off→Manual→Sandbox(macOS Seatbelt). Section 5: "质量评分" — 架构5星 模型5星 错误处理4星 并发4星 安全4星. No watermark. Simplified Chinese only.
